title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A shepherd boy travels from Spain to Egypt in search of treasure, discovering the meaning of life along the way.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through tiny consistent changes.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
author: Douglas Adams
description: An absurd and hilarious journey through space after Earth is demolished for a hyperspace bypass.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
author: Viktor Frankl
description: A psychiatrist's account of surviving Nazi concentration camps and finding meaning amid suffering.

title: The Little Prince
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
description: A pilot stranded in the desert meets a mysterious little prince from another planet.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A woman who grew up in a survivalist family escapes and educates herself, earning a PhD at Cambridge.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind from ancient foragers to modern civilization.

title: The Power of Now
author: Eckhart Tolle
description: A guide to spiritual enlightenment through living in the present moment.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A young nobleman navigates politics, religion, and ecology on a desert planet rich in spice.

title: The Four Agreements
author: Don Miguel Ruiz
description: Ancient Toltec wisdom offering a code of personal conduct that transforms lives.

title: Flowers for Algernon
author: Daniel Keyes
description: A man with low IQ undergoes experimental surgery to become a genius, with bittersweet results.

title: When Breath Becomes Air
author: Paul Kalanithi
description: A neurosurgeon diagnosed with terminal cancer reflects on what makes life meaningful.

title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A woman discovers a library between life and death where each book holds a different life she could have lived.

title: Thinking Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A psychologist explores the two systems that drive the way we think and make decisions.

title: The Alchemist of Souls
author: Anne Lyle
description: In an alternate Elizabethan London, a young swordsman gets entangled in court intrigue.

title: Coraline
author: Neil Gaiman
description: A bored girl finds a secret door to a parallel world that seems perfect — until it turns sinister.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
description: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life by focusing on what truly matters.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world through deep, undistracted work.

title: The Body Keeps the Score
author: Bessel van der Kolk
description: A psychiatrist explores how trauma reshapes the mind and body, and paths to recovery.

title: Norwegian Wood
author: Haruki Murakami
description: A young man navigates love and loss in 1960s Tokyo, haunted by the death of his best friend.

title: The Alchemist's Apprentice
author: Kate Thompson
description: A young girl discovers she has magical abilities and must learn to control them.

title: Ikigai
author: Héctor García
description: The Japanese secret to a long and happy life — finding your reason for being.

title: The Stranger
author: Albert Camus
description: A detached French Algerian man commits a senseless murder and contemplates his fate.

title: Grit
author: Angela Duckworth
description: A psychologist explains why talent alone is not enough — passion and perseverance matter more.

title: The Kite Runner
author: Khaled Hosseini
description: A man haunted by his past betrayal of a childhood friend seeks redemption in war-torn Afghanistan.

title: Brave New World
author: Aldous Huxley
description: A futuristic society built on happiness through conditioning is challenged by a savage outsider.

title: The Secret
author: Rhonda Byrne
description: The law of attraction explains how positive thinking can transform your life.

title: Quiet
author: Susan Cain
description: A defence of introverts in a world that values extroversion too highly.

author: George Orwell
description: A totalitarian future where Big Brother monitors every thought and action of its citizens.

title: The Road
author: Cormac McCarthy
description: A father and son journey through a post-apocalyptic wasteland, struggling to stay alive and human.
